untranslatable_reason: Eve & Adam double bottom is a complex multi-bar pattern requiring: (1) identification of two distinct price lows at approximately the same level across non-consecutive bars, (2) confirmation of high volume at both lows, and (3) an intermediate recovery between them. This requires pattern recognition logic beyond simple point-in-time indicator comparisons. The signal also lacks specific entry triggers (e.g., breakout threshold, pullback confirmation level) and explicit exit conditions (marked AUTHOR_SILENT). A proper implementation would need multi-bar lookback logic, swing point detection, or a dedicated pattern-matching function not available in this rules engine.
translation_notes: Attempted minimal translation using volume confirmation and reversal logic, but this fundamentally undershoots the pattern's definition. The pattern detection itself (two lows at same level, intermediate recovery) cannot be expressed with allowed operators.
